# Hodahel Moinzadeh

> Hodahel Moinzadeh ("Hody") is an AI Systems Engineer based in Baltimore, Maryland,
> specializing in infrastructure automation, identity and access management, and AI
> integration. This is his professional portfolio and resume site.

## Key facts
- Name: Hodahel Moinzadeh (goes by "Hody")
- Role: AI Systems Engineer
- Location: Baltimore, Maryland, USA
- Focus: infrastructure automation, identity & access (Microsoft 365, Entra ID),
  AI integration, PowerShell, Microsoft Graph API, DevOps, self-hosting.
- Website / resume: https://hodahelmoinzadeh.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/hodahel-moinzadeh
- GitHub: https://github.com/hodyhq
- Consulting practice: https://hody.dev (HODY)

## Sections on the site
Experience, Projects, Tech Stack, Certifications, Education, Contact.
